prompt: A luxury cosmetics advertisement poster featuring a single upright lipstick centered on a glossy black cube pedestal against a rich monochrome deep crimson red studio background. The product is a bold satin-finish true red lipstick with the bullet fully extended, dramatic sculpted tip, and a two-tone tube: vivid red upper casing and matte black lower casing. On the front of the black base, vertical white brand text reads BOBBI BROWN. Place elegant editorial copy on the left side in a refined high-fashion serif layout, split across multiple lines, reading It’s not just a lipstick, it’s an attitude., with the final word styled in italic and a slightly brighter coral-red tone than the rest of the text. Add 1 small white logo watermark in the top-right corner reading Pollo.ai. Use cinematic product lighting with soft but high-contrast highlights, subtle reflections on the pedestal, crisp edges, premium beauty-campaign styling, minimalist composition, square format, clean negative space, and a polished ecommerce-ready luxury ad aesthetic.
